title: SK Hynix debuts on Wall Street with a record IPO of $26.5 billion
summary: Shares of the South Korean company surge more than 13% on its first day of trading on the Nasdaq, driven by the rise of artificial intelligence.

title: Apollo buys easyJet for £5.7 billion after improving its offer
summary: The investment fund outperforms Castlelake and acquires the British low-cost airline, which will become private.

title: Meta introduces its own AI chip and its shares rise due to lower infrastructure cost
summary: Meta's new internal chip enters production in September, reducing dependence on external suppliers and increasing the company's value.

title: Oil exceeds $76 due to tensions with Iran and the IEA warns about fuel supply
summary: The end of the ceasefire in Gaza and the resumption of negotiations raise crude oil, while the International Energy Agency warns of a possible shortage of gasoline and diesel.

title: Wall Street closes higher, driven by corporate earnings and tech stocks
summary: The Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq record moderate gains in a positive session for the U.S. market.

title: Apple sues OpenAI for theft of trade secrets and breach of confidential information
summary: The tech company accuses OpenAI and former executives of improperly appropriating data to develop their own devices.

title: Shein receives Chinese approval for its long-awaited IPO
summary: The fast fashion giant gets the green light from Beijing to list abroad, paving the way for one of the largest IPOs of the year.

title: Circle obtains a national banking license in the U.S. to operate as a bank
summary: The cryptocurrency company gets regulatory approval to conduct traditional banking activities.

title: Vodafone soars in stock market after investor Xavier Niel enters
summary: Shares of the British operator rise more than 12% with the participation of the French businessman, raising expectations of restructuring.

title: JPMorgan's AI agents outperform the traditional 60/40 portfolio
summary: The US bank shows that its AI algorithms achieve higher returns than the classic combination of bonds and stocks.

title: Ibex 35 falls 2.3% in a week marked by the Middle East crisis
summary: The Spanish index suffers weekly losses weighed down by geopolitical volatility and global uncertainty.

title: Asian stock markets rise driven by semiconductor stocks
summary: The Nikkei and Topix advance thanks to enthusiasm for SK Hynix and Micron, with Japanese index futures gaining more than 500 points.

title: Investors reevaluate artificial intelligence amid debt sales and sector uncertainty
summary: Doubts about the return of AI and bond issuance by big tech companies generate caution among investors.

title: News in European banking: card changes, investigations, and investment preferences
summary: In Germany, Commerzbank switches to Visa and the manipulation investigation is closed, while the Ibex 35 favors large banks.

title: China and North Korea reaffirm their military alliance on the 65th anniversary of the bilateral treaty
summary: Presidents Xi Jinping and Kim Jong Un exchange congratulatory messages and commit to defending common interests.

title: Ohtani hits his 21st home run but misses All-Star Game due to injury
summary: The Dodgers player continues his explosive offensive season, but inflammation in his left knee prevents him from participating in the All-Star Game and pitching.

title: Spain advances to the World Cup semifinals after defeating Belgium with a goal from Merino
summary: The Spanish national team wins 1-0 and will face France in search of a place in the final.

title: Meta removes its AI image feature due to privacy criticism and its detector fails
summary: The company removes the tool after user protests and its detector of AI-generated images does not recognize its own creations.

title: Golf results: Nakajima rises and Iwaki places second at the Evian
summary: In the US men's tournament, Ryo Nakajima is sixth, while in the women's Evian, Akie Iwaki occupies second place.

title: Sinner and Zverev to contest Wimbledon final and Murakami to participate in Home Run Derby
summary: The Italian and the German face off for the title; in the NBA, Kawamura debuts in the Summer League; and in baseball, the Japanese player will compete in the Home Run Derby.
